overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing first-person driving through Night City's elevated highways and neon-lit streets. The player navigates a futuristic sports car from high-speed highway driving down to the gritty Kabuki district street level, then exits the vehicle and explores on foot.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway with panoramic neon city views

agents.ego_description: piloting futuristic sports car at high speed along elevated highway through Night City

entered.detail: futuristic vehicle dashboard with dual screens and cyan ambient lighting
metal guardrail along the elevated highway edge
dense cluster of skyscrapers with colorful neon advertisements and holograms

segments.scene_description: The clip opens with a first-person view from inside a futuristic sports car speeding along an elevated highway. The dashboard glows with cyan light as the vehicle races past railings, with a sprawling neon-lit cityscape visible through the windshield.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway off-ramp descending to street level under overpass

events.description: vehicle exits main highway and begins descending ramp toward street level
vehicle slows down significantly while navigating the curved descent

agents.ego_description: slowing down while navigating the highway exit ramp and approaching street level

entered.detail: vendor stalls with umbrellas visible at street level

segments.scene_description: The vehicle exits the main highway onto a descending ramp, passing under massive concrete overpass structures. The camera curves downward as street-level market stalls come into view, and the neon skyline shifts to the left as the car descends.

scene_state.functional_zone: street market under overpass with vendor stalls and concrete barriers

events.description: vehicle comes to a complete stop in the market area under the overpass
driver opens door and exits the vehicle

agents.ego_description: navigating slowly through the narrow street market and coming to a stop

entered.detail: concrete road barriers with black and yellow stripes
heaps of garbage bags and debris along the street edge

segments.scene_description: The car navigates through a narrow street market beneath the overpass, passing concrete barriers and trash piles. The vehicle slows to a stop among vendor stalls, and the driver begins to exit the car.

scene_state.functional_zone: gritty urban street market in Kabuki district with neon advertisements

events.description: camera switches from first-person vehicle interior to third-person perspective following the character on foot

agents.ego_description: walking away from the parked vehicle and exploring the neon-lit street market

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red clothing walking away from the parked car toward the market stalls

entered.detail: sleek black futuristic sports car with illuminated headlights
large glowing advertisements including Kiroshi and Cytech brands on building facades

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts to third-person as the character exits the vehicle and walks through the gritty Kabuki district street market. The parked sports car remains behind as the character passes trash piles and concrete barriers, with massive holographic billboards illuminating the scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous movement from a high-speed descent along an elevated highway into the gritty, pedestrian-level bustle of the Kabuki district. It begins from inside a futuristic sports car, racing past railings with a cyan-lit dashboard and a sprawling neon cityscape visible through the windshield. As the vehicle exits the main highway, the camera curves downward along a descending ramp, passing under massive concrete overpasses while the skyline shifts to the left. The scene then transitions into a narrow street market where the car slows to a stop among vendor stalls, concrete barriers, and piles of trash. Finally, the perspective shifts to third-person as the character exits the vehicle and walks further into the market, illuminated by massive holographic billboards.
